subject: Operator pivot 16:55Z: NO proxy. Use airplane-mode toggle per account. EMPIRICALLY CONFIRMED working on BOTH phones — exact ADB commands inside
operator_directive_verbatim: no no proxy at all you do not need it. you will do airplane mode on, then ariplane mode off after 10 seconds and confirm ip changed if not do it til it does PER account you create and complete everything else i said to do

P1_2A061JEGR09301.verdict: BOTH interfaces rotated to new IPv6 addresses

P2_26031JEGR17598.verdict: BOTH interfaces rotated to new IPv6 addresses

diagnose_empirically_verified_just_now.timing_validated: 10s ON + 15-18s OFF cellular reattach window = ~28s total per rotation

EXACT_ADB_COMMANDS_THAT_WORKED: # Step 1 — Enable airplane mode (both methods needed; broadcast alone doesn't flush radio on Android 14+):
adb -s <serial> shell su -c 'settings put global airplane_mode_on 1; am broadcast -a android.intent.action.AIRPLANE_MODE --ez state true'
adb -s <serial> shell su -c 'settings put global airplane_mode_on 0; am broadcast -a android.intent.action.AIRPLANE_MODE --ez state false'
# Step 4 — Wait for cellular reconnect (empirically 15-18s on Verizon):
# Step 5 — Verify IP changed (compare rmnet1 + rmnet2 inet6 vs pre-toggle):
BEFORE_IPS=$(adb -s <serial> shell su -c 'ip -6 addr show 2>/dev/null | grep rmnet -A1 | grep -oE "inet6 [0-9a-f:]+"')
AFTER_IPS=$(adb -s <serial> shell su -c 'ip -6 addr show 2>/dev/null | grep rmnet -A1 | grep -oE "inet6 [0-9a-f:]+"')
if [ "$BEFORE_IPS" = "$AFTER_IPS" ]; then echo NO_ROTATION_RETRY; else echo ROTATED_OK; fi
# Operator-directed retry loop: if not changed, do it until it does
